about.en: Internet Computer is a layer 1 blockchain developed by the DFINITY Foundation for running smart contracts and web applications directly on-chain. ICP is used for governance, staking, and converting into cycles that pay for computation. The network aims to provide decentralized cloud-like infrastructure for applications and services.
about.es: Internet Computer es una blockchain de capa 1 desarrollada por DFINITY Foundation para ejecutar smart contracts y aplicaciones web directamente on-chain. ICP se utiliza para gobernanza, staking y conversion en cycles que pagan la computacion. La red busca ofrecer infraestructura descentralizada similar a la nube para aplicaciones y servicios.
about.ca: Internet Computer es una blockchain de capa 1 desenvolupada per DFINITY Foundation per executar smart contracts i aplicacions web directament on-chain. ICP s utilitza per a governanca, staking i conversio en cycles que paguen la computacio. La xarxa busca oferir infraestructura descentralitzada similar al nuvol per a aplicacions i serveis.
